case_title: DOROTHY MAE WILLIAMS VS. CORY PANG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, DOROTHY MAE AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, CORY U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $30.00). SERVED DEC-06-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, CORY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PANG, CORY U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DOROTHY MAE

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CORY PANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-09-2008 AT 8:30AM.THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY DAMAGES BEYOND THE $199.99 PREVIOUSLY CREDITED TO HER ACCOUNT BY DEFENDANT U. S. BANK. DEFENDANT PANG, INCORRECTLY NAMED HEREIN AS "PARN" IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES APPEARED.EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: SHAWNA VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DOROTHY MAE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY DAMAGES BEYOND THE $199.99 PREVIOUSLY CREDITED TO HER ACCOUNT BY DEFENDANT U. S. BANK. DEFENDANT PANG, INCORRECTLY NAMED HEREIN AS "PARN" IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES APPEARED.EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
